pi_items.source: Queried WMS GetCapabilities endpoint at https://ows.mundialis.de/services/service? and confirmed the server is active and accessible.
Parsed WMS GetCapabilities XML response and verified it contains layers such as 'OSM-WMS', 'OSM-WMS-no-labels', and 'TOPO-OSM-WMS'.
Confirmed against export_result.sh script which evaluates the creation of this specific file path.
Measured the base project file 'countries_base.gvsproj' to be 49KB, meaning the saved project will easily exceed a 2KB minimum threshold.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real OpenStreetMap data via a WMS service hosted at ows.mundialis.de. The WMS service is publicly accessible and provides layers containing the name fragment 'OSM' (e.g., 'OSM-WMS'). The task combines this with a Natural Earth vector base project (49KB size) and requires saving the output to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/wms_basemap_project.gvsproj, safely exceeding the 2KB minimum file size requirement.
